strengths: Nearly 20 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and through multiple open-source projects demonstrates product ownership and initiative valued in the role
Recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows active engagement with the agentic AI space central to this position
concerns: No formal AI/ML credentials and AI experience is recent (2025-present) and tooling-focused rather than reflecting the depth of recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms the role specifies

Current and recent titles (Senior Software Developer, Staff Software Engineer) place the candidate well below the director-level IC seniority the role requires, with no evidence of strategic advisory or enterprise-scale thought leadership
Cloud platform expertise is superficial — a single AWS CDK mention in one role — with no demonstrated ability to advise customers on cloud or AI adoption strategy at scale
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth as a polyglot engineer with a founder mindset and recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor who is a recognized AI authority capable of advising strategic enterprise customers — a profile that requires deep AI specialization, a track record of influencing at executive scale, and substantial cloud platform expertise, none of which are evident in his background at the level the position requires.
